misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Shanks's conversation with Loki is very important; it is clear that Shanks warned them about the dangers of attacking the World Government, specifically cautioning Loki about the "King o
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Shanks's conversation with Loki is very important; it is clear that Shanks warned them about the dangers of attacking the World Government, specifically cautioning Loki about the "King of the World" and his immense power,at which point Gaban interrupts him.

misc.title: It’s pretty clear what Shanks’s goal is going to be. And it makes sense why he fought Loki, probably because he knew how strong Imu is and realized Loki wasn’t ready for that? Shanks is definitely goi
misc.text: It’s pretty clear what Shanks’s goal is going to be. And it makes sense why he fought Loki, probably because he knew how strong Imu is and realized Loki wasn’t ready for that? Shanks is definitely going to target Imu...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Imagine if Imu summoned all 19 weapons at once and combined them into one giant weapon, or used them for a combined Air Slash attack, that shit would probably pulverize all of Elbaf; tha
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Imagine if Imu summoned all 19 weapons at once and combined them into one giant weapon, or used them for a combined Air Slash attack, that shit would probably pulverize all of Elbaf; that is just crazy OP... And if every weapon has a special ability, GG....

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Another weapon of the 19 Families is also mentioned; it is called "Muramasa." Muramasa (村正; born before 1501), commonly known as Sengo Muramasa, was a famous swordsmith who founded the M
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Another weapon of the 19 Families is also mentioned; it is called "Muramasa." Muramasa (村正; born before 1501), commonly known as Sengo Muramasa, was a famous swordsmith who founded the Muramasa school and lived during the Muromachi period in Japan!!👀👀

misc.title: #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECE1189 It's this one, The only Katana out of the 19 blades More than likley a black blade WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1189 Another weapon of the 19 Families is also mentioned; i
misc.text: #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECE1189 It's this one, The only Katana out of the 19 blades More than likley a black blade WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1189 Another weapon of the 19 Families is also mentioned; it is called "Muramasa." Muramasa (村正; born before 1501), commonly known as Sengo Muramasa, was a famous swordsmith who founded the Muramasa school and lived during the Muromachi period in Japan!!👀👀 — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2079893172964954418#m

misc.title: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an av
misc.text: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an average temperature of 29.8°C Around 40 people are confirmed to have drowned while swimming in efforts to cool down. (theguardian.com/world/2026/j…) Community note: The 29.8°C is France's national average of day and night temperatures across 30 weather stations; local highs reached 44.3°C. The 40 drownings occurred over the past week during the heatwave. apnews.com/article/heat-w… bbc.com/news/articles/… — https://nitter.net/PopBase/status/2069754874074398969#m
